evidence.source_title: Performance of Non-EPI DW MRI for Pediatric Cholesteatoma Follow-Up.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 37313857. 2024/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: The intravoxel incoherent motion (IVIM) method of magnetic resonance 
imaging (MRI) analysis can provide information regarding many physiological and 
pathological processes. This study aimed to investigate whether IVIM-derived 
parameters and the apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) can act as imaging 
biomarkers for predicting non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) response to 
anti-tumor therapy and compare their performances.
METHODS: This prosp
